heroText: Victoria is a capital city in Seychelles, connecting local landmarks, event context, transport access and seasonal reasons to plan a visit.

highlights.name: Victoria
highlights.text: Victoria is a capital city in Seychelles, connecting local landmarks, event context, transport access and seasonal reasons to plan a visit.

history.text: France claimed the Seychelles islands before the settlement that became Victoria developed on Mahe.
French colonists settled the area that later became Victoria, establishing the first town foundation on Mahe.
The British renamed the settlement Victoria after Queen Victoria; it had previously been known as L'Etablissement.
Seychelles became a separate Crown colony, making Victoria the administrative centre of the islands.
Seychelles became independent, and Victoria continued as the capital of the new republic.

history.label: Today
history.text: Modern Victoria concentrates the port, government offices, markets and cultural institutions of Seychelles.
